content:
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary purpose of controlled access in a computer network?",
      "options": ["A) To increase network capacity", "B) To enhance network security", "C) To allow multiple devices to share the same medium", "D) To prevent unauthorized access to the network"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "Controlled access is a technique used to allow multiple devices to share the same medium while preventing unauthorized access to the network."
